tasks.task: Add better error states and feedback when loading queues fails in `QueuesPage.tsx`.
Implement drag and drop reordering for tasks within groups and across groups using `@dnd-kit`.
Build a central `WorkspacePage.tsx` to overview all active projects, recent agent activities, and quick actions, acting as the main entry point for a session.
Add workspace-specific state in Zustand (e.g. `useWorkspaceStore`) to manage current project context, loaded schemas, and workspace-level preferences.
Implement the global hotkey (e.g., Ctrl+Shift+N) for a floating quick-note/snippet window as described in TODO.md.
Replace custom dropdowns in BranchPicker and SourcePicker with a standard Radix DropdownMenu component for consistency (from TODO.md).
